chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6269 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.4594/2025 2. For hearing of CMA No.26638/2021 3. For hearing of main case 04.03.2025 Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General 1. Granted 2-3. The petitioner claims to have been appointed on contract basis, however, not a single subsisting contract is discernible from the file. In mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined vide judgment of Supreme Court of Pakistan in Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq & Others reported as 2024 SCMR 527, Full bench of this Court in Muhammad Arif vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2025 P.L.C. (C.S) 93 and Division Bench of this Court in Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 this petition is found to be not maintainable, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
